column1: Dataset Title: Russian Arctic Vegetation Archive: Kola peninsula dataset (floodplains)
Dataset Author: Natalia Koroleva and Ekaterina Kopeina (historical data from R. Kalliola incl.)

Dataset Reference: N. E. Koroleva, E. I. Kopeina. (2018). The floodplain meadows of class Molinio-Arrhenatheretea Tx. 1937 in the Varzuga River valley (Murmansk Region). Rastitelnost Rossii, 34. https://doi.org/10.31111/vegrus/2018.34.85
Dataset Table: Species Cover Data for Kola peninsula dataset (floodplains)

Dataset Notes: Species cover classes are the Braun-Blanquet cover-abundance scale. Taxa are listed in alphabetical order. Both the dataset author determinations and the current nomenclature according to the Panarctic Species List (PASL) are listed.
